name: sg-k8s
description: SecurityGroup template for managed Kubernetes (dynamic) node groups. Intentionally opens all TCP/UDP ports and ICMP inbound because the required ports vary by CSP and managed-K8s implementation (control-plane<->node, node<->node CNI/overlay, NodePort 30000-32767, etc.). This preserves the previous permissive behavior for K8s; tighten per-CSP (e.g. NodePort + the 'internal' keyword + SSH) once requirements are confirmed.
